option_1.description: Generate a production-ready 'constellation_matrix.h' header file linking BEGIN, SEED, MASTER, SENTINEL, and NEXUS-PRIME structural definitions together.

option_2.description: Execute an automated Python-based test script to simulate a high-velocity stream of 10,000 valid and invalid Cyborg bytecode packets striking the NEXUS-PRIME router simultaneously.

option_3.description: Deep-dive into the precise JSON/INI schema layouts used inside the 'avis-datalake' to enforce the 'AIFVS-ARTIFACT' header rule across file types.
